# Thumb First Platform

The technical-verification layer of the thumb-first mobile suite — finds and fixes objective platform defects in mobile web apps and PWAs (iOS Safari, Android Chrome).

## Install

```sh
npx github:Elvis020/hey-skills add thumb-first-platform --to ./skills
```
